passages.passage_text: In this type of questions, a figure(s) of dice is/are given and asked about the opposite digit/dot/letter/colour of a particular face. Candidates are required to find the answer value from the given options.

questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Finding Digits/Dots/Letters/Colours on the Opposite Face
questions.body: Find the digit at the face opposite to the face having digit 6 in the given dice.

solutions.solution: According to the question, 6 + 2 = 8, 2 + 4 = 6, 4 + 6 = 10 So, the given dice is a standard dice. ∴ Digit opposite to 6 = 1
